gaps.issue: No tests exist for the session-state module (src/lib/session-state.ts) which doesn't exist yet. This module is the core of the spec — PID file reads/writes, staleness detection, cleanup.
gaps.recommendation: Create src/lib/session-state.ts and a corresponding test file covering: no PID file, live PID, dead PID cleanup, and missing session JSON.

gaps.issue: No tests exist for src/commands/status.tsx (file doesn't exist yet). The spec defines 4 explicit test scenarios.
gaps.recommendation: Create src/commands/status.tsx and a test file covering all 4 spec scenarios before or alongside implementation.

gaps.issue: src/index.tsx has no routing for the 'status' command. The command will silently fall through to unknown-command handling until wired up.
gaps.recommendation: Add 'status' to the command routing block and help text in src/index.tsx; cover with an integration smoke test.

gaps.issue: No lint toolchain configured. No .eslintrc, biome.json, or lint script in package.json.
gaps.recommendation: Not blocking for this feature, but any new files won't be linted. Low priority unless style consistency is required.

gaps.issue: No coverage configuration. Can't measure whether new session-state and status command code is adequately tested.
gaps.recommendation: Add vitest coverage config (c8/istanbul) to get a coverage baseline. Not required to ship the feature.

gaps.issue: 3 pre-existing test failures from the harness-cli → salazar rename. Unrelated to the status command but inflate failure counts.
gaps.recommendation: Update the 3 failing tests to reflect the new package name. Quick fix, separate from status command work.
